subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-19
subcodes.first_line: If we look with a perceiving eye upon the world of creation, we find that all existing things may be classified
subcodes.subjects: @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @man's distinction from the animal, @war and peace, @oneness; unity of religion, @high station of learning, @unity; oneness of humanity
